actions.name: Track Event
actions.description: Capture behavioral events for both known and anonymous users to build a complete activity timeline in Yonoma.

fields.label: Event Name
fields.description: The name of the event to track.

event.title: Event Name
event.description: The name of the event to track.

fields.label: Identifiers
fields.description: Unique identifiers for the contact. User ID and email are required. Anonymous ID is optional.

identifiers.description: Unique identifiers for the contact. User ID and email are required. Anonymous ID is optional.

userId.title: User ID
userId.description: Unique user identifier from your app.

anonymousId.title: Anonymous ID
anonymousId.description: Anonymous identifier from Segment for tracking pre-identified activity.

fields.description: The Yonoma list to add the contact to.

listId.title: List ID
listId.description: The Yonoma list to add the contact to.

fields.description: The timestamp of the event. Defaults to the current time if not provided.

timestamp.title: Timestamp
timestamp.description: The timestamp of the event. Defaults to the current time if not provided.

fields.label: IP Address
fields.description: The IP address of the user. Defaults to the current user IP if not provided.

ip.title: IP Address

fields.description: The user agent of the user.

path.description: Path of the page being viewed.

search.description: Search query used to find the page.

fields.label: Tags to Add
fields.description: List of tags to add to the Contact. Can be a single string or array of tags. Tags must already exist in Yonoma.

tags_to_add.title: Tags to Add
tags_to_add.description: List of tags to add to the Contact. Can be a single string or array of tags. Tags must already exist in Yonoma.

fields.description: List of tags to remove from the Contact. Can be a single string or array of strings. Tags must already exist in Yonoma.

tags_to_remove.title: Tags to Remove
tags_to_remove.description: List of tags to remove from the Contact. Can be a single string or array of strings. Tags must already exist in Yonoma.
